name: Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cucumber, peeled and cut into 8 slices
1 green bell pepper, cut into 8 rings
1/4 cup olive oil and salad oil blended
recipeInstructions:
1. First make the potato salad by boiling the potatoes in their jackets for about 30 minutes or until tender but not soft. Drain, peel, and slice the potatoes into a bowl. Cut onions and peppers into thin slices, and chop parsley. Add to the potatoes and sprinkle lightly with salt.
2. Fold in the salad dressing using more if necessary to hold the salad together lightly.
3. For the rest of the Salad:
a. Line a large platter with the outside lettuce leaves and place 3 cups of potato salad in a mound in the center of the platter.
b. Cover with the remaining shredded lettuce.
c. Arrange the roka or watercress on top.
d. Place tomato wedges around the outer edges of the salad, with a few on the top.
e. Place cucumber slices between the tomatoes to create a solid base.
f. Arrange avocado slices around the outside.
g. Scatter Feta cheese over the salad, followed by green pepper slices covering all.
h. On top of everything, place shrimp on beet slices and an anchovy fillet on each shrimp.
i. Sprinkle vinegar (more may be added) and the blended oil over the salad.
j. Sprinkle oregano over all and serve immediately.
4. Garlic toasted Greek bread is served with the salad, which is intended for 4 people.
